pokemon:glimmet.name: Glimmet
pokemon:glimmet.summary: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.
Glimmet’s toxic mineral crystals look just like flower petals. This Pokémon scatters poisonous powder like pollen to protect itself.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.

pokemon:glimmora.name: Glimmora
pokemon:glimmora.summary: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.
Glimmora’s petals are made of crystallized poison energy. It has recently become evident that these petals resemble Tera Jewels.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.
